title: Reconcile account with no discrepancy
objective: Verify that reconciling an account where the actual balance matches the recorded balance produces a clean confirmation and no transaction

steps.step: Note the recorded balance of the 'Bank' account (e.g. 1000)
Open Reconciliation for the 'Bank' account, enter actual balance = 1000

steps.expected_result: Screen shows 'Reconciled ✓' with today's timestamp. No new transaction appears in the Timeline.
